calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:13 am
Judge Pro Tem Rick Wise, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Ali Khostovan appears with his attorney Mary Ann Dresner. Respondent, Allen Hebert appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and answer questions from Judge Wise.


EXHA (1) Trial Brief
EXHR (A) 1 page document
EXHR (B) Letter to Ali
EXHR (C) 3 letters to Ali
EXHR (D) Moving receipts

10:01 am
Exhibits are retained, matter is submitted,

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Judgment Entered
